titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the William Sherman Collection of New York University Memorabilia MC.430
titlestmt.author: Rachel Searcy

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-03-25 19:24:41 UTC.

did.unittitle: William Sherman Collection of New York University Memorabilia
did.abstract: Dr. William Sherman is an alumnus of New York University, earning his B.A. from the College of Arts and Science in 1967 and his Ph.D. from the Graduate School of Arts and Science in 1973. The William Sherman Collection of New York University Memorabilia (dated 1904-1967) consists of materials collected by Dr. Sherman during his tenure as a student at NYU, as well as in the years following. Materials include vintage postcards depicting the University Heights and Washington Square campuses, a freshman beanie reading "NYU 67," and buttons. Included is a set of 16 buttons in the collection was distributed by the Undergraduate Athletic Organization during the 1965-1967 basketball seasons; two buttons include harmful language describing Indigenous peoples.
did.physloc: Materials are stored offsite and advance notice is required for use. Please request materials at least two business days prior to your research visit to coordinate access.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The William Sherman Collection of New York University Memorabilia (dated 1904-1967) consists of materials collected by Dr. Sherman during his tenure as a student at NYU, as well as in the years following. Materials include vintage postcards depicting the University Heights and Washington Square campuses, a freshman beanie reading "NYU 67," and buttons. Included is a set of 16 buttons in the collection was distributed by the Undergraduate Athletic Organization during the 1965-1967 basketball seasons; two buttons include harmful language describing Indigenous peoples.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: This collection is protected by copyright and/or related rights. You are free to use materials in the collection in any way that is permitted by the copyright and related rights legislation that applies to your use. For other uses you need to obtain permission from the rights-holder(s).

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Donated by Dr. William Sherman in December 2025; the accession number associated with this gift is 2025.048.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Identification of item, date; William Sherman Collection of New York University Memorabilia; MC 430; box number; folder number or item identifier; New York University Archives, New York University.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: At the time of accessioning materials were rehoused in archival boxes and folders, and arranged alphabetically. Two buttons from the pack distributed by the Undergraduate Athletic Organization with harmful language about Indigenous peoples are housed separately.

bioghist.head: Biographical Note
bioghist.p: Dr. William Sherman is an alumnus of New York University, earning his B.A. from the College of Arts and Science in 1967 and his Ph.D. from the Graduate School of Arts and Science in 1973.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: These buttons include harmful language about Indigenous peoples.
